overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive through a futuristic neon-lit metropolis. The player navigates a multi-lane elevated highway, transitioning from covered underpasses to bright open sky and into dark urban canyons with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The vehicle interior features a red leather steering wheel and digital dashboard displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway underpass transitioning to open sky

events.description: vehicle emerges from dark underpass into bright midday sunlight
transition from covered highway section to open elevated highway

agents.ego_description: accelerating onto the highway while following a red sports car in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: futuristic car dashboard with green digital displays and red leather steering wheel
small decorative figure mounted on the dashboard
massive concrete highway structure overhead creating shadow
large glowing advertisement screen on building facade
tall cyberpunk skyscrapers with reflective glass surfaces

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a shadowed highway underpass with the vehicle dashboard visible. As the car emerges around 3 seconds, bright midday sunlight floods the scene revealing a futuristic cityscape with glass towers and digital billboards. The driver accelerates onto the multi-lane elevated highway following a red sports car.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with toll gantries

events.description: passing under a large green highway toll gantry structure
changing lanes to the right to pass slower traffic

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the open highway, maneuvering between vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV traveling in the right lane parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: green metal structure spanning across the highway lanes
tall green transparent sound barrier wall along the highway edge
sleek glass office building with geometric facade patterns
bright cloudless sky visible above the highway

segments.scene_description: Driving on an open elevated highway under bright clear skies. The vehicle passes under a large green toll gantry around 15 seconds while surrounded by modern glass architecture. The green noise barrier runs along the right side as the driver changes lanes to navigate through moderate traffic including a black SUV.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon highway with overhead structures

events.description: entering the shadow of tall buildings, lighting becomes darker and more contrasted
transition from open highway to enclosed urban canyon with close building walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrowing urban canyon while following traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead with brake lights occasionally illuminated

entered.detail: tall building facades closing in on both sides of the highway
enclosed walkway structure crossing over the highway
large glowing pink neon sign with 'TENGU' text on building facade
dark glass and steel building surfaces in shadow

segments.scene_description: The highway enters an urban canyon as tall buildings close in on both sides, blocking the sky. Around 32 seconds, the lighting shifts to mixed shadows with the appearance of a prominent pink 'TENGU' neon sign on the right. The environment becomes more enclosed with overhead pedestrian bridges and darker building facades.

events.description: neon advertisements and artificial lighting become the primary light sources
slowing down for denser traffic congestion in the enclosed section

agents.ego_description: cruising through the dark urban canyon illuminated by neon signs, navigating denser traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car visible in the right lane alongside ego vehicle

entered.detail: yellow and black striped safety barrier along the road edge
elevated monorail or transit track running above the highway
glowing pink neon sign advertising a hotel
building facades very close to the highway edge creating tunnel effect

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a dark, enclosed urban canyon where artificial neon lighting dominates the scene. The yellow highway railing is prominent on the right, while pink neon signs illuminate the buildings. The sky is mostly blocked by towering structures and overhead transit lines, creating a classic cyberpunk atmosphere with dense traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a shadowed highway underpass into a bright open cityscape that eventually descends into a dark, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins in the dim light of an underpass with the vehicle dashboard visible, before emerging into blinding midday sunlight that reveals glass towers and digital billboards as the driver accelerates behind a red sports car. As the vehicle continues along the elevated highway under clear skies, it passes under a large green toll gantry and navigates through traffic beside a green noise barrier. The scene then shifts as the highway enters a dense urban canyon where towering buildings close in to block the sky, transitioning the lighting into mixed shadows highlighted by a prominent pink Tengu neon sign. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed and dark, dominated by artificial pink neon illumination and overhead transit lines that create a dense, cyberpunk atmosphere.
